user.title: NISS Broadband Setup
user.description:
Enter your session cookies from portal.nissbroadband.com.

Open your browser DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies while logged in to copy them.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach portal.nissbroadband.com. Check your network.
error.invalid_auth: The portal rejected the cookies (HTTP 401/403). Refresh them from your browser.
error.cannot_parse: Connected successfully but no usage data was found. The page layout may have changed.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
